# Pace

> On-device Mac voice agent that reads your screen and acts with local context.

## Product

- [Home](https://pace-6xg.pages.dev/): Product landing

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://pace-6xg.pages.dev/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://pace-6xg.pages.dev/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://pace-6xg.pages.dev/llms.txt)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase

## Product surfaces

- [Download](https://heypace.app/download) (or current Pages origin)
- [Compared hub](https://pace-6xg.pages.dev/compared)
- Per-competitor pages under `/compared/<slug>` (see sitemap)
